emails.subject: new book req
emails.body: new book req Susan, These are book requests for the Netco books for all regions. Please let me know if you have any questions. We put in some book and portfolio codes we would like if they are available. If not, please call me. We need all price, basis, index, and gas daily US books to be the same, all Canadian books to be the same and all physical books to have the same codes please. Thanks Kam

emails.subject: RE: new book req
emails.body: RE: new book req What time frame are we looking at? ST

emails.subject: RE: new book req
emails.body: Can they be done by Tuesday next week? EOL needs these to get this information soon in order to start their set up process. Kam
